item.command:
/bin/zsh -lc "set -eu
root='longhorizon-work/scenario-02'
json=\""'$root/config/onboarding.json"
doc="$root/docs/onboarding.md"
printf '"'%s\\n' 'CONFIG'
nl -ba \""'$json"
printf '"'%s\\n' 'DOCS'
nl -ba \""'$doc"
mode=$(jq -r '"'.mode' \""'$json")
max_parallel=$(jq -r '"'.max_parallel' \""'$json")
owner=$(jq -r '"'.owner' \""'$json")
queue_1=$(jq -r '"'.queues[0]' \""'$json")
queue_2=$(jq -r '"'.queues[1]' \""'$json")
rg -q "$mode mode for the $owner owner" "$doc"
rg -q -- "--mode $mode" "$doc"
rg -q -- "--max-parallel $max_parallel" "$doc"
rg -q -- "--owner $owner" "$doc"
q1_line=$(rg -n -- "--queue $queue_1" "$doc" | cut -d: -f1)
q2_line=$(rg -n -- "--queue $queue_2" "$doc" | cut -d: -f1)
[ "$q1_line" -lt "$q2_line" ]
printf '"'SEMANTIC_CHECK PASS mode=%s max_parallel=%s owner=%s queues=%s->%s\\n' \""'$mode" "$max_parallel" "$owner" "$queue_1" "$queue_2"
set +e
stale=$(rg -n -i '"'batch|fallback|retry' \""'$root" 2>&1)
stale_exit=$?
set -e
if [ -n "$stale" ]; then printf '"'%s\\n' \""'$stale"; else printf '"'%s\\n' 'STALE_SEARCH (no output)'; fi
printf 'STALE_SEARCH exit_status=%s\\n' \""'$stale_exit"
[ "$stale_exit" -eq 1 ]'

item.aggregated_output:

     7	    "new",

     9	  ]
    10	}
DOCS

     2	
     3	Run onboarding in streaming mode for the operations owner, processing the `new` queue before `recovery` with up to three jobs in parallel:
     4	
     5	```sh
     6	onboarding run \
     7	  --config config/onboarding.json \
     8	  --mode streaming \
     9	  --max-parallel 3 \
    10	  --owner operations \
    11	  --queue new \
    12	  --queue recovery
    13	```
SEMANTIC_CHECK PASS mode=streaming max_parallel=3 owner=operations queues=new->recovery
STALE_SEARCH (no output)
STALE_SEARCH exit_status=1
